{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220751236A05715D0DCA27CBC61E"}"},"total":2931},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7450538699886052158","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"1. "这部小说真是引人入胜，情节紧凑，角色个性鲜明。作者的想象力和创造力让人印象深刻。"
2. "这本书的故事情节跌宕起伏，充满了悬念和转折，让我一口气读完全部。"
3. "我非常喜欢这本小说的叙事风格，文字优美流畅，让人沉浸在故事的世界里。"
4. "这部小说的人物塑造非常成功，每个角色都有自己独特的性格和命运，让人难以忘怀。"
5. "这本书的结尾给我留下了深刻的印象，它既出人意料又在情理之中，让人回味无穷。"
6. "这部小说的主题深刻且引人深思，它探讨了人性、道德和社会等诸多方面的问题，让人在阅读过程中不断反思。"
7. "这本小说的叙述节奏掌握得非常好，既不过于匆忙也不过于拖沓，让人感觉恰到好处。"
8. "我喜欢这本小说的对话部分，因为它展示了角色之间的真实情感和复杂关系，让人更容易理解和感同身受。"
9. "这本书的封面设计和排版也非常精美，让人一看就喜欢上了这本书。"
10. "总的来说，这是一本非常棒的小说，它的故事情节、人物塑造和主题思想都让人赞不绝口，强烈推荐给喜欢读书的朋友们！""},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734720928,"group_id":"7411198126351993918","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3pHdTrIwbTYppUokw1uuCcm8oU1NQVpHMjEnvBksJIi","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/29ac520c6df24145825123deceabe57d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708969&x-signature=aJJZueTJQLPTrIQgd29mVcupYX0%3D","user_id":"2871577910722173","user_name":"迷惑鬼密日眼"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2871577910722173","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7411198126351993918","book_info":{"abstract":"（故事向、偏黑暗向、淡淡温情、无女主、不无敌、非系统爽文、微群像、介意慎入）
　　废土之上，神灵贪婪的划分领地。
　　为了在兽潮中生存，人们只能上供卑微的信仰，渴求获得神明怜悯，成就超凡。
　　黄野生于乱民废墟，在正神城池就读，却替邪神行走人间。
　　“我早就挖好了坟墓，一座给我，一座送神。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/1ff75ec170f0d468f43f8c39d10fc32c","author":"转角天不黑","author_id":"","book_id":"7411198126351993918","book_name":"神惊！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#180810","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":869,"name":"废土","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=869&name=废土&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7411198346808803902","read_count":"60006","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2073578"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"819","tags":"都市高武,都市,反派,无女主,群像,废土","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/94ecca80d593b1f234aa57796a4ee154~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321083&x-signature=YpjkErMqKd66PdE%2BNxV1OSaPn5c%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"55014642039","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"101"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220751236A05715D0DCA27CBC61E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":1,"listen_dura
